subject: [RFC v2 20/21] selftests/mm: add partial_mremap test for move_page_tables

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No comment provided by David Hildenbrand in the thread.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series adds a new selftest to the mm module, specifically designed to test partial mremap functionality on transparent huge pages (THPs). The test verifies that partial mremap correctly splits the PMD, moves only the requested page, and preserves data integrity in both the moved region and the original mapping. This is achieved through a series of allocations, writes, and verifications.
